tools.name: UFW Firewall
tools.description: Uncomplicated Firewall - simple interface to iptables
tools.post_install_msg: UFW installed. Configure rules with: sudo ufw allow/deny <port|service>

tools.name: AirVPN (Eddie)
tools.description: AirVPN client for privacy and secure browsing
tools.install_cmd: curl -s https://eddie.website/repository/keys/eddie.gpg.key | sudo apt-key add - && echo 'deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/eddie.gpg] https://eddie.website/repository/debian stable main' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/eddie.list && sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y eddie-cli
tools.post_install_msg: Eddie installed. Start with: eddie --help

tools.name: ClamAV
tools.description: Antivirus engine for detecting trojans, viruses, malware
tools.enable_cmd: systemctl enable clamav-daemon && systemctl start clamav-daemon
tools.post_install_msg: ClamAV installed. Update database: sudo freshclam, Scan: sudo clamscan -r /path

tools.name: rkhunter
tools.description: Rootkit scanner and system integrity monitor
tools.post_install_msg: rkhunter installed. Run: sudo rkhunter --check --skip-keypress

tools.name: Firejail
tools.description: Linux namespaces and seccomp profiles for process isolation
tools.post_install_msg: Firejail installed. Sandbox apps with: firejail <application>

tools.name: lm-sensors
tools.description: Hardware monitoring tools - temperature, voltage, fan sensors
tools.post_install_msg: lm-sensors installed. Detect sensors: sudo sensors-detect

tools.name: psensor
tools.description: GUI for monitoring hardware temperatures and fan speeds
tools.post_install_msg: psensor installed. GUI for system monitoring.

tools.name: glances
tools.description: Cross-platform system monitoring dashboard
tools.post_install_msg: glances installed. Run: glances

tools.name: hardinfo
tools.description: System hardware information and benchmarking tool
tools.post_install_msg: hardinfo installed. Run: hardinfo

tools.name: CoreCtrl
tools.description: GUI for AMD GPU monitoring and control (RDNA/NAVI/VEGA)
tools.post_install_msg: CoreCtrl installed. Run: corectrl

tools.name: rocm-smi
tools.description: AMD GPU monitoring and control command-line tool
tools.post_install_msg: rocm-smi installed. Check GPU: rocm-smi --showtemp --showpower

tools.name: Fail2ban
tools.description: Intrusion prevention - ban IPs attempting repeated unauthorized access
tools.post_install_msg: Fail2ban installed. Check status: sudo fail2ban-client status

tools.name: Auditd
tools.description: System audit daemon - logs system calls and file access for forensics
tools.post_install_msg: Auditd installed. Check status: sudo systemctl status auditd

tools.name: SSH Hardening
tools.description: SSH configuration hardening - strong ciphers, key exchange, modern algorithms
tools.post_install_msg: SSH hardened. Review config: sudo sshd -T

tools.name: Unattended-upgrades
tools.description: Automatic security updates - keeps system patched with latest security fixes
tools.post_install_msg: Unattended-upgrades enabled. Check status: sudo systemctl status unattended-upgrades

tools.name: Smartmontools
tools.description: Disk SMART health monitoring - prevents data loss from failing drives
tools.post_install_msg: smartmontools installed. Check status: sudo systemctl status smartd

tools.name: AppArmor
tools.description: Mandatory Access Control - additional security profiles and enforcement
tools.post_install_msg: AppArmor profiles installed. Check status: sudo aa-status --summary

tools.name: Kernel Sysctl Hardening
tools.description: Advanced kernel hardening - exploit mitigations and attack surface reduction
tools.post_install_msg: Kernel parameters hardened. Check status: sudo sysctl kernel.yama.ptrace_scope

tools.name: Bluetooth Security
tools.description: Bluetooth security controls - disable or harden wireless connectivity
tools.post_install_msg: Bluetooth tools installed. Configure with aegis for hardening options

tools.name: AIDE
tools.description: File integrity monitoring - detects unauthorized filesystem changes (defense-in-depth)
tools.post_install_msg: AIDE installed with daily scans. Database: /var/lib/aide/aide.db

tools.name: Docker Security (Trivy)
tools.description: Container image vulnerability scanning - detects CVEs in Docker images
tools.post_install_msg: Trivy installed. Scan images with: sudo aegis docker-scan <image:tag>

tools.name: OpenSCAP
tools.description: CIS/DISA compliance verification - audits system against security benchmarks
tools.install_cmd: apt install -y libopenscap8 openscap-scanner openscap-utils scap-security-guide
tools.post_install_msg: OpenSCAP installed with weekly compliance scans. Run: sudo aegis openscap-scan

tools.name: GRUB Hardening
tools.description: GRUB bootloader hardening — disable recovery mode, optional superuser password, restrict boot timeout
tools.post_install_msg: GRUB hardened. Recovery mode disabled. Optional: set GRUB password with grub-mkpasswd-pbkdf2

tools.name: USBGuard
tools.description: USB device authorization policy — blocks unauthorized USB devices including BadUSB/rubber ducky attacks
tools.post_install_msg: USBGuard active. Authorize new devices with: sudo usbguard allow-device <id>

tools.name: Syslog (rsyslog)
tools.description: Centralized log management — collects auth, kernel, cron, and alert logs with 90-day retention
tools.post_install_msg: Centralized logging active. Logs in /var/log/aegis/

tools.name: Lynis
tools.description: System hardening auditor — produces a hardening index score and prioritized security suggestions
tools.post_install_msg: Lynis installed with weekly audits. Review suggestions: sudo lynis show details <TEST-ID>
